name: Attach Tool To Robot
description: Attach a tool to a robot planning group inside a RobotCellState. Any tool already attached to the same group is automatically detached.

inputParameters.name: tool_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the tool inside the RobotCell.

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group to attach the tool to.

inputParameters.name: attachment_plane
inputParameters.description: Optional Rhino Plane or COMPAS Frame describing the tool's frame relative to the end-effector link. Defaults to World XY (coincident with the end link).

inputParameters.name: touch_links
inputParameters.description: Optional list of robot link names allowed to collide with the tool.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the tool attached.
